scripts.eval:tools: pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && node scripts/eval-tool-selection.mjs
scripts.eval:explore: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/eval-explore-live.mjs
scripts.calibrate:tools: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && node scripts/calibrate-tool-names.mjs
scripts.eval:tools:nl: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && node scripts/eval-nl-tool-selection.mjs
scripts.eval:differentiation: pnpm eval:memory-poisoning && pnpm eval:receipt-drift && pnpm eval:action-log-tamper && pnpm eval:policy-symmetry
scripts.eval:agent: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/tools build && pnpm --filter @muse/prompts build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-agent.mjs
scripts.eval:self-improving: pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/eval-self-improving.mjs
scripts.eval:plan-quality: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/prompts build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && node scripts/eval-plan-quality.mjs
scripts.eval:vision: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node apps/cli/scripts/verify-vision-actions.mjs
scripts.demo: pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/messaging build && node scripts/demo.mjs
scripts.dogfood:auto-extract: pnpm --filter @muse/api build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/dogfood-auto-extract.mjs
scripts.dogfood:phase-d: pnpm --filter @muse/mcp build && pnpm --filter @muse/autoconfigure build && node scripts/dogfood-phase-d.mjs
scripts.precheck:grounding: pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && pnpm --filter @muse/cli build && node scripts/precheck-grounding.mjs
scripts.eval:orchestration: pnpm --filter @muse/model build && pnpm --filter @muse/multi-agent build && node scripts/verify-orchestration.mjs
scripts.eval:browser-agent: pnpm --filter @muse/browser build && pnpm --filter "@muse/autoconfigure..." build && node scripts/eval-browser-agent.mjs
